text:
It’s blooming season at Pollinations! 🌸✨ We just pushed some cozy updates to make your creating experience even sweeter.

🎨 The App Showcase got a total glow-up—better descriptions, metrics, and a fresh UI so your work shines.
🔌 Devs, we see you: The new Polly-API is here and it’s OpenAI-compatible. Plug in your favorite tools seamlessly.
🛡️ Plus, new safety models and aspect ratio fixes for Grok (no more squished masterpieces!).

Also... new games dropped in Social_Bots. Go play! 🎮🐝

Build something beautiful today.

🔗 Link in bio to explore the changes!

#pollinations #opensource #cozypixelart #indiedev #generativeai #buildinpublic #8bitart #pixelart #retrogaming #creativecoding #aiartcommunity
